GitHub Repository Metadata
==========================

Copy these manually into GitHub → Settings → General

Description:
  AI-powered Islamic NSFW filter for addiction recovery.
  Real-time screen censor + audio mute. Win32 overlay
  with guardian angel art. Python 3.11 + NudeNet.

Topics:
  nsfw-filter, addiction-recovery, islam, python,
  windows, nudenet, whisper, overlay, content-filter,
  mental-health, open-source
